title: SCP: Modern
description: Enter a modern world inspired by the SCP universe where exploration, survival, and mysterious encounters change the way you play Minecraft.
body:

# SCP Modern

**SCP Modern** is an interactive Minecraft Java mod currently in beta that immerses players in a modern environment inspired by the SCP universe. In this mod, you will encounter hostile and friendly SCP entities, advanced technology, security systems, and unique mechanics that significantly change the way Minecraft is played.

This mod focuses on **quality over quantity**, featuring complex systems, clean implementations, and exceptional optimization so it can run on all types of computers without requiring large modpacks or complicated setups.

---

# Main Features

## Security Camera System
One of the main systems in the mod is the security system. A lot of time has been invested into creating a clean, functional, and expandable system.

The system currently includes:
- Functional security cameras  
- Monitors to view cameras in real time  
- Disks that record and store camera data  
- A system prepared for future security expansions  

This system will continue to expand in future updates.

---

## Rank System
The mod includes a rank system based on progression through missions.  
This system is designed to be **scalable**, allowing players to unlock access to new areas, systems, tools, and content within the facility.

This system is still in development during the beta, but it will become one of the core systems of the mod in the future.

---

## Modern Blocks and Decoration
The mod also adds:
- Modern decorative blocks  
- Technological equipment  
- Furniture  
- Laboratory objects  
- SCP facility decorations  
- Blocks for building modern bases and installations  
Everything is designed with a modern, clean, and detailed visual style.

---

## Optimization
One of the most important goals of **SCP Modern** is optimization.  
The mod is designed to:
- Use low resources
- Run on low-end computers
- Not require large modpacks
- Maintain complex systems without affecting performance

Our goal is for any player to enjoy the mod without performance issues.

---

# Mod Status
The mod is currently in **Beta**, which means:
- Some systems are incomplete
- More SCPs will be added
- More technological systems will be added
- More blocks and mechanics will be added
- There may be major changes in future versions

---

# Extra / Future Plans
Additional information about the future of the mod and related projects:

Planned features for the future:
- Advanced NPC systems
- More complex mission system
- Complementary maps
- Mod expansions
- Possible premium content such as maps or special add-ons

However, the main mod **will always have content accessible for all players**, and not everything will be paid content. Regular players will also have access to important and unique features.

A large part of the development has been done independently, so some updates may take time, but we always prioritize **quality, optimization, and well-built systems**.

---

# Summary
**SCP Modern is not just an SCP mod, it is a mod about systems, technology, security, and building modern facilities inside Minecraft.**
